data.name: 精靈飼養牧場
data.detailed_description:
故事:
精靈，傳說中輕靈聖潔的生物，面對著無論哪方面都不如自己的人類時，態度顯得十分高冷。最近，有傳聞稱一些精靈開始輕視貶低人類，甚至把人類囚禁起來開始馴養。這個傳聞恰巧傳到了同樣是人類的男主耳中。事實上，男主並不是一個普通的人類，在過去由於某種機緣巧合，他知道某種可以完全掌控精靈的方法，只需一次，無論多麼高傲的精靈，都會對他俯首稱臣！

現在，男主有了一個宏大的目標，用肉棒去征服那個位於森林深處的高級精靈之國！把它改造成自由播種的肉便器牧場！將那些擁有絕世美貌以及超凡魔力的傲慢精靈打造成專屬於自己的家禽吧！讓她們懷上自己的孩子，在肉便器牧場上盡情地交配，好好享受異世界生活吧！

特點:
  • 官方漢化版。
  • 原裝日文語音。
  • 高清16:9和4:3 h圖。
  • 長達幾小時的內容。
  • 帶有音樂和音效。
  • 帶有角色動態。
  • 帶有收藏展覽。
  • 24個成人劇情讓你和女母精靈們快樂。

精靈飼養牧場由著名日本製作室 Norn/Miel所創作,並由櫻桃吻吻正式漢化, 把日本遊戲帶到全世界。

**注意**
所有角色的描述和圖片都屬成人並沒有任何未成年人物用於這遊戲裡。

data.short_description: 所謂的精靈，不過是自以為是的高貴而已，其實是完全沒有繁殖能力的低等種族啊！ ？就由我來在她們的體內撒下自己的種子吧！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OSX 10.6+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Elf Breeding Farm
data.detailed_description:
Everyone knows the deal with being reborn in another world by now right? Awesome abilities and overpowered weapons galore! Well unfortunately for our "hero" that isn't the case.

Waking up with a burning desire to slay dragons you embark on your quest, but quickly realize you're an average human in this world too! Failing to slay the dragon the townspeople look to sacrifice you to satisfy the beast. Instead of finding out if you can be reborn once more, beautiful elves appear and knock the big beastie out cold. Your heartfelt thanks fall on deaf ears as the elves scold you and the townspeople for disturbing the dragon and blame them for their overabundance of greed.

Once the dragon debacle settles, and our hero now kicked out of town, dashes off into the woods in hopes of catching a glimpse of one of those busty
booty-full elf babes! With a mind addled with lewd thoughts, you stumble through some "impenetrable" magical barrier and fall face first into the ample bosom of a very angry (but still very sexy) savior who is shockingly, unhappy to see you.

An altercation ensues and Melvie leader of the Dark Elves, appears to whisk our poor protagonist away to have her wicked way with you, tying you up... only to sacrifice you to some dark spirits! (I know not as sexy as I was hoping either.) However, part-way through Melvie's big evil speech, her magical restraints come undone, as you restrain the urge to hypnotically stair at the subtle jiggle of her assets! It's time to show these stuck-up elves the power of your human long-sword!

Work your way through this foreign land collecting a harem of succulent elves in this tasty tale of depravity. Do you think you're a lewd enough dude to domesticate this elven empire?


  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Each Elf is fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Audio including music and special effects
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • 24 scenes where you take care of your elven baby mamas.

Elf Breeding Farm is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Norn/Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

** PLEASE NOTE **
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: Centuries of mastering ancient magics and unbeatable fighting techniques, all undone by dirty thoughts and lewd fantasies! Take these sexy elves down a peg as they quiver in awe of your indomitable human "spirit"!
data.supported_languages: English, Spanish - Latin America, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese

Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX-compatible sound

  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
